aaliyah nye.comment: Nye (knee) is listed as out for Thursday's game against Washington.

brionna jones.comment: The Dream expect Jones (knee) to resume team activities in the coming weeks, per Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com.

maddy westbeld.comment: Westbeld (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Aces.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

odyssey sims.comment: Sims (ankle) is probable for Thursday's game against the Sun.

alanna smith.comment: Smith (concussion) is questionable for Thursday's game against the Sun.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against New York.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Liberty.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

sophie cunningham.comment: Cunningham (illness) did not practice Tuesday, Tony East of The Next reports.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) did not practice Tuesday, Tony East of The Next reports.

justine pissott.comment: Pissott (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Sparks.

kate martin.comment: Martin (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game in Indiana.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

a'ja wilson.comment: Wilson (leg) is out for Tuesday's game against the Liberty.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Liberty.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) has been ruled out for Tuesday's Commissioner's Cup Championship against the Liberty.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) has been cleared to return to practice, the Lynx announced Wednesday.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

eliska hamzova.comment: Hamzova (coach's decision) is out for Sunday's game in Dallas.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

noemie brochant.comment: Brochant (ankle) is listed as out for Thursday's game against Seattle.

jovana nogic.comment: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (coach's decision) won't play Sunday versus the Mystics.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (finger) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Mystics.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) is listed as out for Thursday's game against the Mercury.

ezi magbegor.comment: Magbegor (foot) is listed as probable for Thursday's game against the Mercury.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

kiki rice.comment: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

sonia citron.comment: Citron (knee) is questionable for Thursday's game against Atlanta.

georgia amoore.comment: Amoore (knee) is questionable for Thursday's game against Atlanta.
